subject: WM-0092 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified prior desktop input gap is fixed: desktop-shell e2e calls the repaired baseline from both dev and packaged Electron launches and now dispatches canvas pointer selection plus Equal/ArrowLeft keyboard checks while only reading debug/UI state. Web/Desktop a11y coverage, bilingual title, non-color cues, no audio/video cues, reduced flashing/overflow checks, and read-model boundaries are intact. Required checks pass.
